headline: Sentiment down 55% this week, optimism declining
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 28% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 119 quotes and 91 at strong intensity - people are expressing anger very forcefully today.
• The frustration score of 76.4 sits in the middle of its typical range but jumped significantly from yesterday's 51.0.
• Optimism improved from yesterday's very low levels but remains below average, while fears stayed consistently subdued.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
